articles.title: Why Cardano Bull Trend Isn’t Over And 91% Increase Is Imminent, deVere CEO Nigel Green
articles.description: One look at the charts and any crypto investor will see Cardano is currently suffering. The digital asset is currently down with the rest of the market, which is suffering in the wake of the Evergrande situation in China. The market has been in a downtrend as the situation has evolved. Its biggest ties to the market being the fact that Tether allegedly owns some of the Evergrande bonds. This...

articles.title: Kava announces $185 million DeFi fund following similar moves by Fantom, Algorand
articles.description: Eager to scale decentralized finance (DeFi) for mainstream adoption, the cross-chain platform Kava, which counts three protocols, $2,1 billion in assets on-chain, and over 280 thousand users, is ready to expand.

articles.description: AMC will start working on integrating Dogecoin payments

articles.title: Smart Contracts Coming To Bitcoin: The Ultimate Ethereum and Cardano Killer?
articles.description: Its smart contract season as Bitcoin, the largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, is gearing up for a smart contract upgrade courtesy of Dfinity’s Internet Computer blockchain (ICB). The decision which received 96.55% approval on the platform’s native Network Nervous System (NNS) connection is the 20,586th since ICP broke into mainstream cryptocurrency ranks in May. Following […]

articles.title: Altcoins see a 35% bounce after Bitcoin reclaims $43,000
articles.description: LPT, COTI and AXS lead altcoins higher after ETH hits $3,000 and Bitcoin bulls take control of $43,000.

articles.title: Terra Competitor Kava Expands DeFi With $185M Fund
articles.description: Kava, a competitor to Terra in the decentralized finance (DeFi) space, has announced the launch of a $185 million fund aimed at expanding its DeFi ecosystem. This initiative is designed to support the development of new projects and innovations within the Kava network, enhancing its offerings and competitiveness in the rapidly evolving DeFi landscape.

articles.description: While many analysts believe Bitcoin is destined for six-figures if support at $40,000 can hold up, others are predicting an imminent bear cycle.
